methods.description: Describes the setup and operation of the Environmental Exposure Unit (EEU), a 47 m² air-conditioned room with turbulent mixing ventilation, used for exposing up to 20 volunteers simultaneously to pollen atmospheres aerosolized from well-characterized samples via a dry dispersion technique. The method includes procedures for introducing pollen, ensuring atmospheric homogeneity, and continuously recording relevant parameters. An extensive physical evaluation of the system's performance was also conducted.

steps.description: The EEU is a 47 m 2 air conditioned room continuously ventilated in a turbulent mixing mode.
steps.searchable_summary: Describe and configure the Environmental Exposure Unit (EEU) room environment including size, air conditioning, and ventilation mode.
Prepare well-characterized pollen samples for aerosolization.
Aerosolize prepared pollen samples using a dry dispersion technique.

steps.description: ...and introduced into the room at four locations beneath the ceiling.
steps.searchable_summary: Introduce aerosolized pollen into the EEU room at four specific locations beneath the ceiling.

steps.description: Special measures are taken to obtain spatial and temporal homogeneity of the exposure atmosphere...
steps.searchable_summary: Implement special measures to ensure spatial and temporal homogeneity of the pollen exposure atmosphere within the EEU.

steps.description: Up to 20 volunteers can be exposed simultaneously to pollen atmospheres...
steps.searchable_summary: Expose volunteers (up to 20 simultaneously) to the controlled pollen atmosphere within the EEU.

steps.description: ...the relevant parameters of which are recorded continuously throughout the exposure session.
steps.searchable_summary: Continuously record relevant parameters of the exposure atmosphere (e.g., pollen concentration, temperature, humidity) throughout the exposure session.

steps.description: An extensive physical evaluation of the performance of the system was performed.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform an extensive physical evaluation to validate the performance of the EEU system, including aspects like homogeneity and concentration stability.
inputs: EEU system setup and operation data
outputs: Evaluation report or data on system performance
